mapper.select:
SELECT G.GAME_ID, G.SSNT_YR, G.GAME_DT, G.HOME_TM_ID, HT.TM_KR_NM AS HOME_TM_KR_NM, G.AWAY_TM_ID, AT.TM_KR_NM AS AWAY_TM_KR_NM, G.STDM_ID, S.STDM_KR_NM, G.HOME_SCORE, G.AWAY_SCORE, G.GAME_STTS_CD, GC.CD_NM AS GAME_STTS_NM, G.GAME_TYPE_CD, TC.CD_NM AS GAME_TYPE_NM FROM GAME G JOIN TM HT ON HT.TM_ID = G.HOME_TM_ID JOIN TM AT ON AT.TM_ID = G.AWAY_TM_ID LEFT JOIN STDM S ON S.STDM_ID = G.STDM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD GC ON GC.CD_ID = 'GAME_STTS' AND GC.CD_VAL = G.GAME_STTS_CD LEFT JOIN CMN_CD TC ON TC.CD_ID = 'GAME_TYPE' AND TC.CD_VAL = G.GAME_TYPE_CD
AND G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MONTH(G.GAME_DT) = #{mon} AND G.GAME_DT = #{gameDt} AND (G.HOME_TM_ID = #{tmId} OR G.AWAY_TM_ID = #{tmId})
ORDER BY G.GAME_DT, G.GAME_ID

SELECT G.GAME_ID, G.SSNT_YR, G.GAME_DT, G.HOME_TM_ID, HT.TM_KR_NM AS HOME_TM_KR_NM, G.AWAY_TM_ID, AT.TM_KR_NM AS AWAY_TM_KR_NM, G.STDM_ID, S.STDM_KR_NM, G.HOME_SCORE, G.AWAY_SCORE, G.GAME_STTS_CD, GC.CD_NM AS GAME_STTS_NM, G.GAME_TYPE_CD, TC.CD_NM AS GAME_TYPE_NM FROM GAME G JOIN TM HT ON HT.TM_ID = G.HOME_TM_ID JOIN TM AT ON AT.TM_ID = G.AWAY_TM_ID LEFT JOIN STDM S ON S.STDM_ID = G.STDM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD GC ON GC.CD_ID = 'GAME_STTS' AND GC.CD_VAL = G.GAME_STTS_CD LEFT JOIN CMN_CD TC ON TC.CD_ID = 'GAME_TYPE' AND TC.CD_VAL = G.GAME_TYPE_CD WHERE G.GAME_ID = #{gameId}
